query:
SELECT
            r.pool_id,
            pl.name          AS pool_name,
            SUM(r.amount)    AS "total_earned!: i64",
            COUNT(r.id)      AS "referral_count!: i64"
        FROM referrals r
        JOIN pools pl ON pl.pool_id = r.pool_id
        WHERE r.referrer = $1
        GROUP BY r.pool_id, pl.name
        ORDER BY SUM(r.amount) DESC
